introSection: Unknown is a steel roller coaster from Swiss firm Intamin currently under construction at Dream Island in Moscow, Russia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride's construction had gone vertical by 17 February 2026.

fullText:
Unknown is a steel roller coaster from Swiss firm Intamin currently under construction at Dream Island in Moscow, Russia.

The ride's construction had gone vertical by 17 February 2026.
